# ==================================
# DotNet / C# / Visual Studio
# ==================================

# Build Folders
bin/
obj/
out/

# Rider
.idea/

# User-specific files
*.suo
*.user
*.userosscache
*.sln.docstates

# Auto-generated files
*.vs/
*.vscode/

# ==================================
# DotNet Core / ASP.NET Core
# ==================================

# Logs
*.log

# ASP.NET Scaffolding
ScaffoldingReadMe.txt

# Secret files
secrets.json            # User Secrets
appsettings.Development.json  # Configurações de desenvolvimento local (com senha)
*.publishsettings

# ==================================
# Entity Framework
# ==================================
# Migrations podem ir pro Git se quiser versionar
# Mas arquivos temporários do EF não
**/Migrations/**/Designer.cs
**/Migrations/**/ModelSnapshot.cs

# ==================================
# Node / npm (se tiver frontend)
# ==================================
node_modules/

# ==================================
# Packages
# ==================================
*.nupkg
*.snupkg
*.nuspec
.packages/
project.lock.json
project.fragment.lock.json
artifacts/
.vs/

# ==================================
# VS Code
# ==================================
.vscode/

# ==================================
# Mac / Linux
# ==================================
*.DS_Store
*.swp

# ==================================
# JetBrains
# ==================================
.idea/
*.iml
